---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you are proposing.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include any API or configuration changes if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered and why you prefer your proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Any other context, diagrams, or references that support this request.
